name: Form Step
description: A single step in a multi-step form wizard. Contains one or a few related questions with consistent header structure, progress indication, and navigation controls.
whenToUse: Each step of a multi-step public form wizard
When breaking long forms into digestible chunks

components.name: Back Link
components.usage: Custom styled button with left arrow icon, placed at top of form

components.name: Step Indicator
components.usage: Text-based 'Step X of Y' format, styled as secondary text

components.name: GoabFormItem
components.purpose: Wrap form fields with labels, errors, and help text
components.usage: Required for all form inputs, provides accessibility structure

structure.footer: Primary action button, optionally with secondary actions

example.description: Single question form step for collecting personal information

variants.name: Single question
variants.description: One question per page for maximum focus and simplicity

variants.name: Grouped questions
variants.description: 2-3 related questions together (e.g., street, city, postal code)

variants.name: With conditional questions
variants.description: Show/hide follow-up questions based on previous answers

variants.name: With repeater
variants.description: Allow adding multiple entries (e.g., multiple children)

considerations: Always use 'Save and continue' not just 'Next' - implies progress is saved
Show back navigation on all steps except the first
Use text-based progress (Step X of Y) not progress bars for citizen forms
Keep step titles action-oriented or descriptive
Validate on continue, not on every keystroke
Focus first error field when validation fails
Use appropriate field widths based on expected content length
